title: BTR Blueprint — NEET PG / AIIMS PG 2026
description: 16-week BTR-based study plan for a working doctor on rotating shifts (Morning/Evening/Night/Day-off). High-yield subjects first. Double watch on Pharma, Path, Biochemistry, PSM+Infections. Two buffer weeks for wedding events. Target: complete all content by July 31, 2026.
